description: Address code review issues: SoundManager dangling reference, LaunchedEffect key collision for message/error, shake animation re-trigger, and empty hidden items state message.
steps: Step 1 - Fix SoundManager.kt: Null out mediaPlayer in the onCompletionListener callback to prevent double-release from DisposableEffect.

Step 2 - Fix NgepetViewModel.kt: Add a notificationCounter field to NgepetUiState that increments whenever message or error is set, to guarantee LaunchedEffect re-triggers for identical consecutive values.
Step 3 - Fix NgepetGameScreen.kt LaunchedEffect: Add uiState.notificationCounter as an additional key to the message/error LaunchedEffect.
Step 4 - Fix GuessResultDialog shake animation: Change the LaunchedEffect key from guessResult to Unit so it runs once per composition (each dialog instance is fresh).
Step 5 - Fix HiddenItemGridDialog: Add an empty state message when openItems is empty showing 'Tidak ada kotak tersedia'.
acceptance_criteria: SoundManager nulls out mediaPlayer in onCompletionListener
NgepetUiState has a notificationCounter that increments on message/error changes
LaunchedEffect for notifications is keyed on notificationCounter in addition to message/error
Shake animation LaunchedEffect uses Unit key
HiddenItemGridDialog shows empty message when no open items available
